response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most roles centered on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies; while there is brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015 at National Instruments, it is outdated and not sustained, and there is no evidence of modern C++ STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or cloud-native industrial platform development required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse systems
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring
Extensive background in event-driven architectures and DevOps tooling
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development in the last 9+ years
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT protocols (MQTT, OPC UA)
No demonstrated experience with cloud platforms (Azure) or scalable on-prem industrial systems
